workflow.name: 13. AXON - Alarmas WhatsApp

parameters.query: SELECT id, title, description, due_date, recurrence, phone FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND notified = false AND due_date - (reminder_minutes_before * interval '1 minute') <= NOW() ORDER BY due_date ASC LIMIT 50
UPDATE tasks SET notified = true, updated_at = now() WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id, recurrence

INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, due_date, reminder_minutes_before, recurrence, phone)
SELECT title, description,
  CASE recurrence
    WHEN 'daily' THEN due_date + interval '1 day'
    WHEN 'weekly' THEN due_date + interval '1 week'
    WHEN 'monthly' THEN due_date + interval '1 month'
  END,
  reminder_minutes_before, recurrence, phone
FROM tasks WHERE id = $1::uuid AND recurrence IS NOT NULL
RETURNING id, title, due_date

SELECT id, title, description, due_date, recurrence, phone FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND notified = false AND due_date - (reminder_minutes_before * interval '1 minute') <= NOW() ORDER BY due_date ASC LIMIT 50
UPDATE tasks SET notified = true, updated_at = now() WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id, recurrence

INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, due_date, reminder_minutes_before, recurrence, phone)
SELECT title, description,
  CASE recurrence
    WHEN 'daily' THEN due_date + interval '1 day'
    WHEN 'weekly' THEN due_date + interval '1 week'
    WHEN 'monthly' THEN due_date + interval '1 month'
  END,
  reminder_minutes_before, recurrence, phone
FROM tasks WHERE id = $1::uuid AND recurrence IS NOT NULL
RETURNING id, title, due_date
